name: The Goph Club
address: 10878 County Line Rd Unit F, Madison, AL 35756
about: The Goph Club is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Madison, Alabama, serving the Huntsville area. It offers 24/7 access to Trackman-powered bays where players can play, practice, and compete without tee times or weather delays. The venue is locally owned and operated, providing a flexible and upscale golf experience for serious golfers, busy professionals, and families. Non-members can book hourly, while members receive significant savings and unlimited access. The club is currently on track to open in Q2 of 2026.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level technology trusted by PGA and LPGA professionals
State-of-the-art swing and ball flight tracking for measurable improvement
Flexible pricing with hourly bookings for non-members and 24/7 access for members
Founding member benefits including early access and personalized swing analysis

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar and camera technology for swing and ball flight tracking

faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service, suggesting it may be a BYOB facility.

faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for playing a full round of golf.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and allows up to 4 players per bay, making it suitable for families and juniors.
